tasks.subject: Task 1: Database Schema — Registry, TeamCards & Notifications
tasks.description:
Delete old v1 migration files, then create 7 tables with collaborator-aware RLS, indexes, get_user_id_by_email() SQL function, and auto-create TeamCard trigger (emails sourced from auth.users).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/migrations/20260329000000_create_rights_registry.sql"], "verifyCommand": "supabase db push", "acceptanceCriteria": ["7 tables with RLS", "TeamCard auto-create trigger sourcing email from auth.users", "get_user_id_by_email SQL function", "Collaborator-aware policies"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Database Schema — Notes, Verification & Project About
tasks.description:
Create notes/note_folders tables, add verification columns to artists, add about_content to projects, update RLS, add reset_verified_on_unlink trigger for account deletion cascade safety.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/migrations/20260329100000_add_notes_and_verification.sql"], "verifyCommand": "supabase db push", "acceptanceCriteria": ["notes + note_folders tables", "artists verification columns", "projects about_content", "Updated RLS", "reset_verified_on_unlink trigger"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend Models & Service
tasks.description:
Pydantic models and service layer for registry CRUD, collaboration, TeamCard, notes, verification, notifications.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/registry/__init__.py", "src/backend/registry/models.py", "src/backend/registry/service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd src/backend && python -c \"from registry.models import WorkCreate, TeamCardUpdate, NoteCreate; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All CRUD services", "Option C merge logic", "Auto-verification on invite/claim"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend Router with All Endpoints
tasks.description:
FastAPI router with all endpoints: registry CRUD, collaboration, TeamCard, notes/folders, project about, artist with TeamCard overlay, notifications. Mount at /registry.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/registry/router.py", "src/backend/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd src/backend && python -c \"from registry.router import router; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All endpoints working", "Router mounted at /registry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Email System — Invitation via Resend
tasks.description:
Send invitation emails with claim link via Resend.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/registry/emails.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd src/backend && python -c \"from registry.emails import send_invitation_email; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HTML email template", "Claim link generation", "Expiry notice"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Backend Proof of Ownership PDF
tasks.description:
ReportLab PDF with ownership tables, approval status, licensing, agreements, document hash.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/registry/pdf_generator.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd src/backend && python -c \"from registry.pdf_generator import generate_proof_of_ownership_pdf; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PDF with approval status", "Color-coded cells", "Document hash"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Install BlockNote & Frontend Types, Hooks, Navigation
tasks.description:
Install BlockNote, add TS types for all new tables, create hooks, add routes and Registry card.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "src/integrations/supabase/types.ts", "src/hooks/useRegistry.ts", "src/hooks/useTeamCard.ts", "src/hooks/useNotes.ts", "src/hooks/useRegistryNotifications.ts", "src/App.tsx", "src/pages/Tools.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BlockNote installed", "All types added", "All hooks created", "Routes configured"]}
```
